note: Provenance for the vendored prebuilt ogv.js VP8/VP9 DECODE WASM cores (ADR-085/094). Self-hosted (committed + served same-origin, NOT a runtime CDN dependency). libvpx itself is BSD-3 (WebM Project); the ogv.js wrappers are MIT. 8-bit 4:2:0 only (4:4:4 honestly declined by the glue). The wasm bytes are base64-embedded into vpx-{vp8,vp9}-data-wasm.js so the tail is self-contained (no separate *.wasm asset; tsup bundles it into the lazy vpx-core.js chunk — the vendor-wasm.ts selfContained branch). Re-vendor + sha256-refresh steps are in BUILD.md.
